title: bidens alata
intro: Bidens alata, commonly known as the tick trefoil or tickseed, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, Bidens alata has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions. Bidens alata can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
